title: Options Flow Proxy Signal via Put/Call Ratio
summary: Add a put/call ratio signal dimension using free data from yfinance options chains. A high put/call ratio (>1.2) is a sentiment-bearish signal; extreme ratios (>1.5) can act as a contrarian bullish indicator. Academic research (Journal of Portfolio Management) confirms certain unusual options activity conditions — particularly large, short-dated, OTM contracts with volume > open interest — are statistically associated with abnormal positive returns. This version uses free yfinance options data rather than paid flow feeds.
expected_impact: +1-3% directional accuracy when options flow confirms or contradicts existing signal direction; strongest when used as confluence filter
